name: Caramel Apple Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine oil and sugars. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
2. Combine dry ingredients; add to batter and stir well.
3. Fold in apples, walnuts, and vanilla.
4. Pour into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
5. Bake at 325°F for 1 1/2 hours or until cake tests done.
6. Cool in pan for 10 minutes; remove to a wire rack to cool completely.
7. In the top of a double boiler over simmering water, heat brown sugar, cream, butter, and salt until sugar is dissolved. Cool to room temperature.
8. Beat in confectioner's sugar until smooth; drizzle over cake. Sprinkle with nuts if desired.
